description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: test and deploy, using a global before_script that runs `npm i` and caches the `node_modules` and `.meteor` directories (untracked). Add a `mocha` job in the test stage that uses the `node:latest` Docker image and executes `npm t`. Add a `deploy` job in the deploy stage that also uses `node:latest`, runs only on the `master` branch, and performs the following commands in order: `echo $METEOR_TOKEN > meteor_session_file.json`, `echo $METEOR_SETTINGS > meteor_settings.json`, `curl https://install.meteor.com/ | sh`, and `METEOR_PROFILE=1 DEPLOY_HOSTNAME=$DEPLOY_HOSTNAME METEOR_SESSION_FILE=meteor_session_file.json meteor deploy magic.modweb.io --settings meteor_settings.json`. The pipeline should deploy the Meteor app to the `magic.modweb.io` host using the provided token and settings.
